name: Search Fusion
description: Federated web search fusion for OpenClaw that reuses configured providers in parallel.

webSearch.label: Search Fusion web_search provider
webSearch.help: Declares that this plugin participates in OpenClaw web_search provider discovery.

defaultMode.description: Optional default mode name to use when a request omits both providers and mode. Resolves against custom modes, or built-in starter modes when custom modes are absent.

modes.description: User-defined mode map. Each key is a mode name and each value is a provider id list. When omitted, starter modes are auto-generated: fast (1 provider), balanced (2 providers), deep (all providers).

intentProviders.description: Provider lists keyed by intent hint (research, keyword, answer, news, local). Used when a request carries an intent but no explicit providers or mode. Falls back to the normal default-resolution chain when the intent has no entry here.

research.description: Providers to use for research/in-depth queries (e.g. gemini, tavily, brave, minimax).

keyword.description: Providers to use for keyword/classic web searches (e.g. brave, duckduckgo, minimax).

answer.description: Providers to use for direct-answer queries (e.g. gemini, perplexity, grok).

news.description: Providers to use for news/current-events queries (e.g. brave, tavily).

local.description: Providers to use for location-aware queries (e.g. brave).

defaultProviders.description: Backward-compatible fallback provider ids when a request omits both providers and mode.

excludeProviders.description: Provider ids to never use by default.

sourceTierMode.description: Source-tier reranking policy. off disables tier adjustments, balanced downranks lower-trust classes, strict applies stronger suppression.

countPerProvider.description: Default number of results requested from each provider.

maxMergedResults.description: Maximum merged results returned by the broker.

retry.description: Global retry policy for provider calls. maxAttempts is total attempts including the first try.

maxAttempts.description: Total attempts per provider call, including the first try. Defaults to 3.

backoffMs.description: Initial retry backoff in milliseconds. Defaults to 750.

backoffMultiplier.description: Multiplier applied to each subsequent retry backoff. Defaults to 2.

maxBackoffMs.description: Maximum retry backoff delay in milliseconds. Defaults to 5000.

providerConfig.description: Per-provider overrides keyed by provider id.

count.description: Default result count for this provider when the request does not pass an explicit count.

weight.description: Ranking score multiplier for this provider. 1 is neutral, higher values trust this provider more, and lower values down-weight it.

maxAttempts.description: Total attempts for this provider, including the first try.

backoffMs.description: Initial retry backoff for this provider in milliseconds.

backoffMultiplier.description: Retry backoff multiplier for this provider.

maxBackoffMs.description: Maximum retry backoff for this provider in milliseconds.

providerRetries.description: Deprecated alias for per-provider retry overrides. Prefer providerConfig.<provider>.retry.

maxAttempts.description: Total attempts for this provider, including the first try.

backoffMs.description: Initial retry backoff for this provider in milliseconds.

backoffMultiplier.description: Retry backoff multiplier for this provider.

maxBackoffMs.description: Maximum retry backoff for this provider in milliseconds.
